title: paspalum sanguinale var. extensum
intro: Paspalum sanguinale var. extensum, also known as tall annual paspalum or broadleaf paspalum, is a type of grass native to tropical and subtropical regions. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits associated with Paspalum sanguinale var. extensum include the potential reduction of inflammation and the promotion of wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant often involve drying and infusing the leaves in water to make a tea or decoction.
